query:
WITH LatestChanges AS (
                SELECT transaction_wcpayrol_id,code,trancnt,recordtype,primeseq,state,effdate,classcode,rateeffdate,seqcode,territory,exmod,minprem,exposure,premium,rate,volcomp,hazard,classuffix,diffprem,diffrate,before,after,__$operation,__$start_lsn,__$seqval, 
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY transaction_wcpayrol_id,Code,Trancnt,Primeseq,State,Effdate,ClassCode,RateEffDate,SeqCode,Territory,MinPrem,Exposure,Premium,Rate,Volcomp,Classuffix,DiffPrem,DiffRate,before,after ORDER BY [__$seqval] DESC) AS rn 
                FROM [cdc].[dbo_transaction_wcpayrol_CT] 
                WHERE [__$operation] IN (1, 2, 4) AND __$start_lsn > 0x0
            )
            SELECT transaction_wcpayrol_id,code,trancnt,recordtype,primeseq,state,effdate,classcode,rateeffdate,seqcode,territory,exmod,minprem,exposure,premium,rate,volcomp,hazard,classuffix,diffprem,diffrate,before,after,__$operation,__$start_lsn,__$seqval FROM LatestChanges WHERE rn = 1
